"use strict"; const { stringifyValueForError } = require("./shared"); module.exports = function ({ ruleId, value }) { return ` Configuration for rule "${ruleId}" is invalid. Each rule must have a severity ("off", 0, "warn", 1, "error", or 2) and may be followed by additional options for the rule. You passed '${stringifyValueForError(value, 4)}', which doesn't contain a valid severity. If you're attempting to configure rule options, perhaps you meant: "${ruleId}": ["error", ${stringifyValueForError(value, 8)}] See https://eslint.org/docs/latest/use/configure/rules#using-configuration-files for configuring rules. `.trimStart(); };
